items.body_excerpt: i rode a bus to Bosnia in 2011. The bus station was half rubble. The cab driver who picked me up had a watermelon buckled in the back seat. They essentially flipped Davis for Aldama.

items.title: 🔵Paul George
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
🔵Paul George 
🟢Jaylen Brown

Expected EPM per season via Dunksandthrees.com

Glossary: Estimated Plus-Minus (EPM) is an all-in-one player metric that predicts a player's contribution to the team in points per 100 possessions.

images.alt: Alt text: "Line chart titled 'Estimated Plus-Minus' comparing Paul George (blue) and Jaylen Brown (green) by season from 2010 to 2026. Paul George rises from about -2 in 2010 to a peak near +6 around 2019, dips and recovers to around +5 by 2023-24, then falls to about +1.3 as of June 13, 2026 (age 36.1). Jaylen Brown starts around -2.5 in 2017, climbs to a peak near +2.8 around 2022-23, then declines to +1.3 as of June 13, 2026 (age 29.6). Both players currently show identical EPM values of +1.3."

items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Career Historical Trajectory

🔵Paul George
🔴Jaylen Brown

Darko.app

images.alt: Alt text: "Line chart titled 'DARKO Career DPM Progression' comparing Paul George (blue) and Jaylen Brown (red) from 2010 to 2025. Paul George's DPM rises from about -1 in 2010 to a peak near 4.6 around 2019-2022, then declines to roughly 1 by 2025. Jaylen Brown's DPM starts around -2 in 2016, climbs steadily to a peak near 3.4 around 2022, then declines slightly to about 2.6 by 2025. Source: @kmedved, www.darko.app, @anpatt7."

items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The 2028 pick Boston is getting, or swapping, with the Sixers is kind of complicated.

Boston could get Philadelphia's pick if it lands 1-8. If that pick is 9-30 it's gone from the Sixers in a complicated swap that involves multiple teams.

1/2

items.title: In a shocking move, Jaylen Brown has been traded to the Philadelphia 76ers for Paul George, two first round picks, and two second round picks. It's a very confusing, underwhelming return for an all NBA player. Here's my initial reaction.
items.author: John Karalis
items.body_excerpt: In a shocking move, Jaylen Brown has been traded to the Philadelphia 76ers for Paul George, two first round picks, and two second round picks. It's a very confusing, underwhelming return for an all NBA player. Here's my initial reaction.
